name: cutctx
description: Cutctx context compression for Claude Code — compress, retrieve, and observe token savings in real-time.

tools.name: cutctx_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve original uncompressed content from a Cutctx compression marker

tools.name: cutctx_compress
tools.description: Compress content on demand using Cutctx algorithms

tools.name: cutctx_status
tools.description: View session compression statistics and token savings
